pi_items.source: Fetched NC_001401.2 from NCBI via eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov and counted the bases, matching 4679 exactly.
Verified from the task description instructions and export_result.sh which hardcodes this target output file.
Verified from the task description instructions and export_result.sh which hardcodes this target report file.
Verified from the explicit instructions in task.json step 4.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real AAV2 reference genome (NC_001401.2) downloaded directly from NCBI, which was confirmed to be exactly 4679 base pairs long. The task instructions and verification scripts explicitly require the output GenBank file to be located at /home/ga/UGENE_Data/aav2_results/aav2_annotated.gb and the report file at /home/ga/UGENE_Data/aav2_results/itr_report.txt, with the new annotations named 'ITR'.
